title: EDHOC subdirectory adds sources without creating a Zephyr library
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/CMakeLists.txt:8 enables the edhoc subdirectory when CONFIG_LICHEN_EDHOC is set, but lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/CMakeLists.txt:4-6 only calls zephyr_include_directories(include) and zephyr_library_sources_ifdef(CONFIG_LICHEN_EDHOC edhoc.c). Unlike coap/link/oscore/rpl/schc/senml, it never calls zephyr_library().\n\nImpact: selective builds that enable CONFIG_LICHEN_EDHOC have no EDHOC Zephyr library context for edhoc.c, so the subsystem is either not attached consistently or fails CMake/library setup while every analogous LICHEN subsystem uses its own zephyr_library(). Add the missing zephyr_library() and keep the include/source wiring consistent with sibling subsystems.
close_reason: Completed: added EDHOC zephyr_library() setup and aligned source/include wiring with sibling LICHEN subsystems. Narrow Zephyr configure attempts were blocked by separate existing setup issues; follow-up project-LICHEN-i81y.20 tracks the module path blocker.
